Our Services

Comprehensive
Dermatology Care

Dermatology is a speciality area of medicine dealing with both the medical and surgical aspects of the skin, nails, hair and associated diseases. We treat children, adults and geriatric patients.

General Dermatology

Diagnosis and treatment of a wide variety of hair, nail and skin diseases for patients of all ages.

  • Hyperpigmentation
  • Acne and Rosacea
  • Eczema
  • Psoriasis
  • Keloid
  • Hair and Nail Problems
  • Skin Infections

Cosmetic Dermatology

Advanced aesthetic treatments to rejuvenate, restore and enhance your natural appearance — administered by a qualified dermatologist.

  • Chemical Peel and Cosmeceuticals
  • Dermapen — Micro Needling
  • Botox and Fillers
  • Laser Hair Removal

Surgical Dermatology

Precise surgical interventions performed in a clinical setting by a trained specialist dermatologist.

  • Skin Biopsy on Suspicious Lesion
  • Removal of Benign Lesion
  • Excision of Skin Cancer

About Dr Ngobeni

Dr Claudia
Ngobeni-Mkize

Dr Claudia Ngobeni-Mkize was born in Bushbuckridge but moved to many places within the former Gazankulu homeland. She is currently based in Nelspruit.

She is a qualified specialist dermatologist registered with the Health Professional Council of South Africa (HPCSA).

She acquired her BSc Diet Hons Degree in the year 1999 at MEDUNSA (Medical University of South Africa) and in 2005 completed her MBChB degree, then qualified as a dermatologist in 2013 after obtaining fellowship in Dermatology with the College of Medicine in South Africa.

To keep up with the latest developments in Dermatology and Aesthetic medicine, she attends Dermatology and Aesthetic congresses and workshops.

As part of giving back to the community, she is a regular guest on both Ligwalagwala and Munghana Lonene FM, where she discusses broad dermatology issues and answers questions from listeners. She also partakes in Albinism awareness campaigns, skin cancer awareness campaigns and anti-bleaching cream campaigns targeting high schools.

She renders services to new born children, infants, adults and geriatric patients.

Affiliations

Cosmetic Treatments

Premium Aesthetic
Procedures

Advanced cosmetic dermatology — performed by a qualified specialist, not a beauty salon.

01

Botox & Fillers

Smooth expression lines and restore facial volume with precision-administered injectables. Natural-looking results delivered by a medical dermatology specialist.

Aesthetic Dermatology
02

Dermapen Micro Needling

Stimulate your skin's natural collagen production. Highly effective for acne scars, fine lines, uneven tone and skin texture — with visible, lasting results.

Skin Rejuvenation
03

Chemical Peels

Medical-grade peels that resurface the skin, address hyperpigmentation, melasma and sun damage — customised for your specific skin type and tone.

Skin Resurfacing
04

Cosmeceuticals

Prescription-strength skincare formulated to treat specific skin concerns at a cellular level — prescribed by your dermatologist for your unique skin profile.

Medical Skincare
Conditions We Treat

General Dermatology
Conditions

We diagnose and treat a wide range of skin, hair and nail conditions — for patients of all ages.

Hyperpigmentation

Uneven skin tone, dark spots and discolouration treated by a specialist.

Acne & Rosacea

Specialist diagnosis and treatment plans for acne and redness conditions.

Eczema

Effective management of eczema and atopic dermatitis for lasting relief.

Psoriasis

Specialist care for chronic psoriasis with modern evidence-based treatments.

Hair & Nail Problems

Diagnosis and treatment of hair loss, nail disorders and related conditions.

Bullous Impetigo

Specialist diagnosis and treatment of Bullous Impetigo — a highly contagious bacterial skin infection causing fluid-filled blisters.

Keloid

Specialist treatment to reduce and manage keloid and hypertrophic scarring.

Skin Cancer Screening

Early detection and surgical management of suspicious and cancerous skin lesions.

Community & Media

Giving Back to
the Community

Dr Ngobeni is a regular guest on Ligwalagwala FM and Munghana Lonene FM, and actively participates in public health awareness campaigns.

Skin Cancer Awareness

Dr Ngobeni participates in skin cancer awareness campaigns, educating communities on early detection and prevention.

Albinism Awareness Campaign

An active advocate for albinism awareness, working with organisations to promote protection, dignity and education.

Geriatric Dermatology Education

Discussing geriatric dermatology — skin conditions affecting seniors and educating them about early detection and prevention of skin cancer.

Mpumalanga Dermatology Symposium

Dr Ngobeni addressing fellow medical professionals at the Mpumalanga Dermatology Symposium — sharing expertise and advancing dermatological knowledge across the province.
